intro: Press M to open your menu — check your party, bag, and journal for objectives.
Strange signals stir on the Routes north of town. Walk into the tall grass when you're ready.

lore.chorus: The Chorus once linked all creatures and the land in perfect resonance.
lore.fracture: The Fracture shattered that bond, isolating regions and scattering ancient memories.
lore.veil: The Veil believes restoring The Chorus could awaken a sealed Primordial — they may not be wrong.
lore.rangers: Route Rangers are guardians who test whether you can restore a region's lost resonance.
lore.sigils: Each Resonance Sigil you earn permanently changes the world — paths, weather, and hidden places.
lore.archive: The Memory Archive records every Harmon discovery and the history they remember.
lore.coast: West of Harmona Rest the Fracture bled into the sea, drawing Harmons no archive ever named.
lore.primordial: Beneath the Hollow Barrows sleeps the first resonance itself — the dream older than the Chorus.

stages.title: A New Explorer
stages.objective: Choose your first Harmon and head north to Route 1.
stages.hint: Pick a starter, then leave Harmona Rest through the north gate.

stages.title: First Resonance
stages.objective: Win your first wild battle on Route 1 and feel the valley stir.
stages.hint: Walk through tall grass to find wild Harmons.

stages.title: Disturbance in the Wood
stages.objective: Defeat Rival Sabo in the Echowood (Route 2).
stages.hint: Sabo hunts the same signals you do — he waits near the north of Route 2.

stages.title: Scorch Route Trial
stages.objective: Cross the desert and defeat Ranger Sol to earn a Resonance Sigil.
stages.hint: Ranger Sol guards the scorched route — only the worthy restore its resonance.

stages.title: Heart of the Grove
stages.objective: Reach the Verdant grove and defeat Ranger Ivy.
stages.hint: Ranger Ivy protects the grove's deepest memories.

stages.title: Two Truths
stages.objective: Face Rival Sabo one last time — The Veil and The Rangers both hold pieces of the truth.
stages.hint: Sabo makes a final stand in Verdant Route 3.

stages.title: Salt on the Wind
stages.objective: A new trail has opened west of town. Follow the Tidecross Shore to Saltwind Cove.
stages.hint: Leave Harmona Rest through the western gate onto the beach route.

stages.title: The Second Stand
stages.objective: Cross the Voltmarsh and repel the factions' bolder ambush.
stages.hint: The Veil, Rangers, and Archive regroup on the storm route north of Saltwind Cove.

stages.title: Charge of the Marsh
stages.objective: Defeat Ranger Bolt to earn the Charge Sigil and reach Mirage Hollow.
stages.hint: Bolt guards the northern pass of the Voltmarsh.

stages.title: Through the Dream Reach
stages.objective: Best Ranger Sable and steady your mind to open the Hollow Barrows.
stages.hint: Sable guards the causeway north of Mirage Hollow. A legend meditates on the way.

stages.title: The Final Stand
stages.objective: Face all three factions together in the Hollow Barrows.
stages.hint: They block the processional to the barrow-mound where the Primordial sleeps.

stages.title: The Dream Older Than the Chorus
stages.objective: Wake and face PRIMORDIUS at the barrow-mound — then decide the valley's fate: restore The Chorus, preserve The Fracture, or forge a new balance.
stages.hint: The mound splits at the north end of the Hollow Barrows. Bring your strongest team.
